calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHRIS SMITH'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment was denied for failure to comply with Section 473(b) Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRIS SMITH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCE: Rene Smith (same as Chris Smith), 387-5347 deft & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON APRIL 3, 2006. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
